proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving treatment_enzalutamide have different mean pfs_months than those not receiving it.
Patients receiving treatment_abiraterone have different mean pfs_months than those not receiving it.
Patients receiving treatment_docetaxel have different mean pfs_months than those not receiving it.
Patients receiving treatment_olaparib have different mean pfs_months than those not receiving it.
Patients receiving treatment_lu177_psma have different mean pfs_months than those not receiving it.
Patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab have different mean pfs_months than those not receiving it.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months 3.728 on treatment_enzalutamide (n=20076) vs 3.755 off (n=29924); diff=-0.026, t-test p=0.153.
Mean pfs_months 3.740 on treatment_abiraterone (n=14991) vs 3.746 off (n=35009); diff=-0.006, t-test p=0.776.
Mean pfs_months 3.732 on treatment_docetaxel (n=15187) vs 3.749 off (n=34813); diff=-0.017, t-test p=0.381.
Mean pfs_months 3.829 on treatment_olaparib (n=5098) vs 3.735 off (n=44902); diff=0.094, t-test p=0.00329.
Mean pfs_months 3.741 on treatment_lu177_psma (n=7504) vs 3.745 off (n=42496); diff=-0.004, t-test p=0.872.
Mean pfs_months 3.805 on treatment_pembrolizumab (n=2384) vs 3.741 off (n=47616); diff=0.064, t-test p=0.137.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher ecog_ps is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope in OLS).
Patients with mcrpc=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than mcrpc=0.
Patients with visceral_mets=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than visceral_mets=0.
Patients with bone_mets=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than bone_mets=0.
Higher gleason_score is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher log10(psa_ng_ml) is associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: OLS slope of pfs_months on ecog_ps = -1.161 months/unit (p=0).
Mean pfs_months 3.509 with mcrpc=1 vs 4.031 with mcrpc=0 (diff=-0.521, p=1.58e-181).
Mean pfs_months 3.706 with visceral_mets=1 vs 3.754 with visceral_mets=0 (diff=-0.048, p=0.0345).
Mean pfs_months 3.753 with bone_mets=1 vs 3.742 with bone_mets=0 (diff=0.011, p=0.624).
OLS slope of pfs_months on gleason_score = -0.006 (p=0.486).
OLS slope of pfs_months on log10(psa) = -0.801 months/log10-unit (p=0).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher albumin_g_dl is associated with longer pfs_months.
Higher ldh_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher hemoglobin_g_dl is associated with longer pfs_months.
Higher crp_mg_l is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher nlr (neutrophil-to-lymphocyte ratio) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher alkaline_phosphatase_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: OLS slope on albumin_g_dl = 0.4949 months per unit (p=1.47e-166).
OLS slope on ldh_u_l = -0.0004197 months per unit (p=0.000181).
OLS slope on hemoglobin_g_dl = -0.01152 months per unit (p=0.0225).
OLS slope on crp_mg_l = -0.0006424 months per unit (p=0.507).
OLS slope on nlr = 0.002428 months per unit (p=0.577).
OLS slope on alkaline_phosphatase_u_l = -0.0004974 months per unit (p=0.00663).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with brca2_mutation=1 have different mean pfs_months than brca2_mutation=0.
Patients with ar_v7_positive=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than ar_v7_positive=0.
Patients with msi_high=1 have different mean pfs_months than msi_high=0.
Patients with psma_high=1 have different mean pfs_months than psma_high=0.
Patients with tp53_mutation=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than tp53_mutation=0.
Patients with pten_loss=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than pten_loss=0.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months 3.835 with brca2_mutation=1 (n=4996) vs 3.734 (n=45004); diff=0.100, p=0.00205.
Mean pfs_months 3.734 with ar_v7_positive=1 (n=10038) vs 3.747 (n=39962); diff=-0.013, p=0.58.
Mean pfs_months 3.778 with msi_high=1 (n=1528) vs 3.743 (n=48472); diff=0.035, p=0.515.
Mean pfs_months 3.752 with psma_high=1 (n=29962) vs 3.732 (n=20038); diff=0.020, p=0.273.
Mean pfs_months 3.746 with tp53_mutation=1 (n=22422) vs 3.743 (n=27578); diff=0.003, p=0.866.
Mean pfs_months 3.764 with pten_loss=1 (n=2536) vs 3.743 (n=47464); diff=0.021, p=0.621.

proposed_hypotheses.text: BRCA2-mutant patients receiving treatment_olaparib have longer pfs_months than BRCA2-mutant patients not receiving olaparib (positive interaction brca2_mutation:treatment_olaparib).
PSMA-high patients receiving treatment_lu177_psma have longer pfs_months than PSMA-high patients not receiving Lu177-PSMA (positive interaction psma_high:treatment_lu177_psma).
MSI-high patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab have longer pfs_months than MSI-high patients not receiving pembrolizumab (positive interaction msi_high:treatment_pembrolizumab).
AR-V7 positive patients receiving treatment_enzalutamide have shorter pfs_months than AR-V7 negative patients receiving enzalutamide (negative interaction ar_v7_positive:treatment_enzalutamide).
Higher fatigue_grade is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher pain_nrs is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher dyspnea_grade is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher appetite_loss_grade is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher weight_loss_pct_6mo is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Older age_years is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Patients with rural_residence=1 have shorter pfs_months than urban-residence patients.
Mean pfs_months differs across race_ethnicity categories (ANOVA).
Mean pfs_months differs across insurance_type categories (ANOVA).
Higher smoking_pack_years is associated with shorter pfs_months.
More years of education_years is associated with longer pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: OLS slope of pfs_months on age_years = 0.174 (p=0).
Mean pfs_months rural=3.756 vs urban=3.741 (diff=0.015, p=0.504).

proposed_hypotheses.text: More prior_lines_of_therapy is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Patients with prior_chemotherapy=1 have shorter pfs_months than chemo-naive patients.
Patients with chronic_kidney_disease=1 have shorter pfs_months than those without.
Patients with heart_failure=1 have shorter pfs_months than those without.
Patients with diabetes_mellitus=1 have different pfs_months than those without.
More years_since_diagnosis is associated with longer pfs_months (selection by survival).

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months 3.739 with prior_chemotherapy=1 (n=22453) vs 3.749 (n=27547); diff=-0.010, p=0.592.
Mean pfs_months 3.773 with chronic_kidney_disease=1 (n=5982) vs 3.740 (n=44018); diff=0.033, p=0.231.
Mean pfs_months 3.741 with heart_failure=1 (n=5012) vs 3.744 (n=44988); diff=-0.003, p=0.916.
Mean pfs_months 3.722 with diabetes_mellitus=1 (n=11006) vs 3.750 (n=38994); diff=-0.029, p=0.19.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for ecog_ps, age_years, mcrpc, visceral_mets, ldh_u_l, albumin_g_dl, hemoglobin_g_dl and prior_lines_of_therapy, treatment_docetaxel remains independently associated with pfs_months.
After the same adjustments, treatment_olaparib remains independently associated with pfs_months.
After the same adjustments, treatment_lu177_psma remains independently associated with pfs_months.
After the same adjustments, treatment_pembrolizumab remains independently associated with pfs_months.

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ all_tx + ecog_ps + age_years + mcrpc + visceral_mets + ldh_u_l + albumin_g_dl + hemoglobin_g_dl + prior_lines_of_therapy', df).fit()
smf.ols('pfs_months ~ all_tx + ecog_ps + age_years + mcrpc + visceral_mets + ldh_u_l + albumin_g_dl + hemoglobin_g_dl + prior_lines_of_therapy', df).fit()
smf.ols('pfs_months ~ all_tx + ecog_ps + age_years + mcrpc + visceral_mets + ldh_u_l + albumin_g_dl + hemoglobin_g_dl + prior_lines_of_therapy', df).fit()
smf.ols('pfs_months ~ all_tx + ecog_ps + age_years + mcrpc + visceral_mets + ldh_u_l + albumin_g_dl + hemoglobin_g_dl + prior_lines_of_therapy', df).fit()

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for ecog_ps, age_years, mcrpc, visceral_mets, the interaction brca2_mutation:treatment_olaparib remains positive and significant.
After the same adjustments, the interaction psma_high:treatment_lu177_psma remains positive and significant.
After the same adjustments, the interaction msi_high:treatment_pembrolizumab remains positive and significant.
After the same adjustments, the interaction ar_v7_positive:treatment_enzalutamide remains negative and significant.

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ brca2_mutation * treatment_olaparib + ecog_ps + age_years + mcrpc + visceral_mets', df).fit()
smf.ols('pfs_months ~ psma_high * treatment_lu177_psma + ecog_ps + age_years + mcrpc + visceral_mets', df).fit()
smf.ols('pfs_months ~ msi_high * treatment_pembrolizumab + ecog_ps + age_years + mcrpc + visceral_mets', df).fit()
smf.ols('pfs_months ~ ar_v7_positive * treatment_enzalutamide + ecog_ps + age_years + mcrpc + visceral_mets', df).fit()

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among brca2_mutation=1 patients, mean pfs_months is higher in those receiving treatment_olaparib than those not.
Among psma_high=1 patients, mean pfs_months is higher in those receiving treatment_lu177_psma than those not.
Among msi_high=1 patients, mean pfs_months is higher in those receiving treatment_pembrolizumab than those not.
Among ar_v7_positive=1 patients, mean pfs_months is lower in those receiving treatment_enzalutamide than those not.

analyses.result_summary: In brca2_mutation=1 (N=4996): mean 5.216 on treatment_olaparib (n=529) vs 3.671 off (n=4467); diff=1.545, p=3.95e-27.
In psma_high=1 (N=29962): mean 3.743 on treatment_lu177_psma (n=4486) vs 3.754 off (n=25476); diff=-0.011, p=0.736.
In msi_high=1 (N=1528): mean 3.527 on treatment_pembrolizumab (n=79) vs 3.792 off (n=1449); diff=-0.265, p=0.239.
In ar_v7_positive=1 (N=10038): mean 3.719 on treatment_enzalutamide (n=4019) vs 3.744 off (n=6019); diff=-0.024, p=0.557.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among visceral_mets=1 patients, treatment_docetaxel is associated with longer mean pfs_months than no docetaxel.
Among visceral_mets=0 patients, treatment_docetaxel is associated with different mean pfs_months than no docetaxel.
There is a significant visceral_mets:treatment_docetaxel interaction effect on pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Visceral_mets=1: docetaxel mean 3.723 vs 3.699, diff=0.024, p=0.582.
Visceral_mets=0: docetaxel mean 3.735 vs 3.762, diff=-0.027, p=0.212.

proposed_hypotheses.text: ecog_ps:treatment_docetaxel interaction is significant — docetaxel benefit/harm differs by performance status.
Patients with ecog_ps>=2 have markedly shorter pfs_months than ecog_ps<=1 in the overall cohort.
Among ecog_ps=0 patients, treatment_abiraterone is associated with longer pfs_months than no abiraterone.

analyses.result_summary: ecog_ps=0 (n=17592): abiraterone mean 4.666 vs 4.687, diff=-0.021, p=0.51.

proposed_hypotheses.text: At least one of the 25 SNP genotype features is associated with pfs_months at p<0.05 in univariable OLS (false-positive screening at alpha=0.05).

analyses.code: for each snp: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ snp', df).fit()
analyses.result_summary: 1/25 SNPs reach p<0.05 univariably (Bonferroni threshold 0.002). Top: snp_rs4986893 coef=-0.092 p=0.0145, snp_rs429358 coef=0.047 p=0.0639, snp_rs1065852 coef=-0.048 p=0.0892, snp_rs1799983 coef=-0.030 p=0.118, snp_rs1800896 coef=-0.025 p=0.224

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among brca2_mutation=0 patients, treatment_olaparib has no benefit (or different effect) on pfs_months compared to no olaparib.
Among psma_high=0 patients, treatment_lu177_psma has no benefit (or different effect) on pfs_months compared to no lu177_psma.
Among msi_high=0 patients, treatment_pembrolizumab is not beneficial (or different) for pfs_months.
Among ar_v7_positive=0 patients, treatment_enzalutamide is associated with longer pfs_months compared to no enzalutamide.

analyses.result_summary: In brca2_mutation=0 (N=45004): mean 3.668 on treatment_olaparib (n=4569) vs 3.742 off (n=40435); diff=-0.073, p=0.0191.
In psma_high=0 (N=20038): mean 3.737 on treatment_lu177_psma (n=3018) vs 3.731 off (n=17020); diff=0.006, p=0.874.
In msi_high=0 (N=48472): mean 3.814 on treatment_pembrolizumab (n=2305) vs 3.739 off (n=46167); diff=0.075, p=0.0864.
In ar_v7_positive=0 (N=39962): mean 3.731 on treatment_enzalutamide (n=16057) vs 3.757 off (n=23905); diff=-0.027, p=0.193.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for ecog_ps, mcrpc and visceral_mets, pain_nrs remains negatively associated with pfs_months.
After the same adjustments, weight_loss_pct_6mo remains negatively associated with pfs_months.
After the same adjustments, fatigue_grade remains negatively associated with pfs_months.

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ pain_nrs + ecog_ps + mcrpc + visceral_mets', df).fit()
smf.ols('pfs_months ~ weight_loss_pct_6mo + ecog_ps + mcrpc + visceral_mets', df).fit()
smf.ols('pfs_months ~ fatigue_grade + ecog_ps + mcrpc + visceral_mets', df).fit()

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for ecog_ps, age_years, mcrpc, visceral_mets and prior_lines_of_therapy, mean pfs_months still differs across race_ethnicity categories (joint F-test p<0.05).
After the same adjustments, mean pfs_months still differs across insurance_type categories (joint F-test p<0.05).
After the same adjustments, rural_residence remains associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.code: compare_f_test full vs reduced model with C(race_ethnicity)
compare_f_test full vs reduced model with C(insurance_type)
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted joint F-test for insurance_type F=0.608 p=0.61; raw means: {'medicaid': 3.7407456171437063, 'medicare': 3.754460783639496, 'private': 3.736194439281661, 'uninsured': 3.7260960731380024}.

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ rural_residence + ecog_ps + age_years + mcrpc + visceral_mets + prior_lines_of_therapy', df).fit()

proposed_hypotheses.text: Interaction tp53_mutation:treatment_docetaxel is non-zero (modifies docetaxel effect on pfs_months).
Interaction pten_loss:treatment_abiraterone is non-zero (modifies abiraterone effect on pfs_months).
Interaction tp53_mutation:treatment_olaparib is non-zero.
Higher bmi is associated with longer pfs_months.
Higher heart_rate_bpm is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Lower spo2_pct is associated with shorter pfs_months (positive slope).
Higher systolic_bp_mmhg is associated with longer pfs_months.
liver_mets=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months than liver_mets=0.
adrenal_mets=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months than adrenal_mets=0.
pleural_effusion=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months than pleural_effusion=0.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs 3.707 (pleural_effusion=1, n=7541) vs 3.751 (n=42459); diff=-0.043, p=0.0871.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among ecog_ps>=2 visceral_mets=1 patients, treatment_docetaxel still has the same direction of effect on pfs_months as in the overall cohort.
The three-way interaction ecog_ps:visceral_mets:treatment_docetaxel has p<0.05 in OLS.

analyses.code: subset ecog>=2 & visceral_mets==1; ttest docetaxel groups
analyses.result_summary: ECOG>=2 & visceral_mets=1 (n=1538): docetaxel mean 2.419 vs 2.383, diff=0.036, p=0.708.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Interaction ar_v7_positive:treatment_abiraterone is negative (AR-V7+ patients derive less benefit from abiraterone).
Among ar_v7_positive=1 patients, mean pfs_months on treatment_abiraterone is shorter than off.
Among ar_v7_positive=0 patients, mean pfs_months on treatment_abiraterone is longer than off.

In a single OLS containing ecog_ps, age_years, mcrpc, visceral_mets, ldh_u_l, albumin_g_dl, hemoglobin_g_dl, prior_lines_of_therapy, all six treatments, and biomarker:matched-therapy interactions (brca2_mutation:treatment_olaparib, psma_high:treatment_lu177_psma, msi_high:treatment_pembrolizumab, ar_v7_positive:treatment_enzalutamide), the brca2_mutation:treatment_olaparib interaction is positive and significant.
In the same comprehensive model, the psma_high:treatment_lu177_psma interaction is positive and significant.
In the same comprehensive model, the msi_high:treatment_pembrolizumab interaction is positive and significant.
In the same comprehensive model, the ar_v7_positive:treatment_enzalutamide interaction is negative and significant.
Among ecog_ps==0, the brca2_mutation:treatment_olaparib interaction is positive and significant.
Among ecog_ps>=2, the brca2_mutation:treatment_olaparib interaction is still positive but smaller (modulated by performance status).
Three-way interaction ecog_ps:brca2_mutation:treatment_olaparib has p<0.05.

After adjusting for ecog_ps, age_years, mcrpc, visceral_mets, ldh_u_l, albumin_g_dl, hemoglobin_g_dl, prior_lines_of_therapy and the four biomarker:matched-treatment interactions, the main effect of treatment_olaparib (off-target use, when brca2_mutation=0) on pfs_months is null or negative.
In the comprehensive multivariable model the main effect of treatment_lu177_psma (in psma_high=0) on pfs_months is null or negative.
In the comprehensive multivariable model the main effect of treatment_pembrolizumab (in msi_high=0) on pfs_months is null or negative.
Across the comprehensive model, the four biomarker:matched-treatment interactions remain the dominant treatment-effect drivers; main treatment terms alone are small.

analyses.code: comprehensive multivariable OLS, main-effect coef when interaction term present
analyses.result_summary: In comprehensive model, main effect of treatment_olaparib (i.e. effect when its biomarker=0) coef=-0.009 (p=0.348).

analyses.code: comprehensive multivariable OLS, main-effect coef when interaction term present
analyses.result_summary: In comprehensive model, main effect of treatment_lu177_psma (i.e. effect when its biomarker=0) coef=-0.006 (p=0.579).

analyses.code: comprehensive multivariable OLS, main-effect coef when interaction term present
analyses.result_summary: In comprehensive model, main effect of treatment_pembrolizumab (i.e. effect when its biomarker=0) coef=0.009 (p=0.451).

analyses.code: compare |coef| means main vs biomarker-treatment interaction terms
analyses.result_summary: Mean |coef| main treatment terms = 0.006; mean |coef| biomarker:treatment interaction terms = 0.371. Ratio interaction/main = 59.26.
